title: Unique 84028 Pink Prism Ice Fountains-2 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Pack of 2 Pink Ice Fountain Candles
Firework fountain candles measure 14.5cm in length
Great choice for a pink themed birthday party
Impressive alternative to traditional birthday candles
Combine with other birthday party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Transform a birthday celebration into a sizzling spectacle with these exciting Pink Birthday Fountain Candles. Featuring a shimmering pink design, these ice fountains are sure to add thrills to a pink theme birthday party, anniversary party or other special event. Great as an alternative to traditional birthday candles, these indoor fireworks will turn the celebration cake into an eye-catching centrepiece! Place the fountain upright into a birthday cake or other treat so that it cannot fall over, and light the sealing paper before standing back to watch the sparks fly. The fountain should not be held in the hand or given to children under 5, and should only be sold to those over 16. Please note that the fountain may take a few moments to ignite and will burn for approximately 30 seconds. Safety Warning FOUNTAIN CAT F1 - MUST BE SOLD AS PACKAGED. Suitable for indoor use. SAFETY INFORMATION: Insert upright in soft non-flammable material, e.g. cake. Ensure firwork cannot fall over. Standing sideways, light sealing paper and retire immediately at least 1 metre. Light using a long handled match (do not use a lighter). The fountain may take a few moments to ignite. Burn time approx 30 seconds. Adult supervision required. Not to be sold to persons under the age of 16 years WARNING: Warning: Fire or projection hazard. Keep away from heat, sparks, open flames, hot surfaces. No smoking. In case of fire evacuate area. DO NOT fight fire when fire reaches explosives.
